rationale: Readiness/form set (QA-EVAL-R2.4): each case carries the canonical readiness inputs (form/TSB + optional HRV) PLUS the verdict and the athlete-facing summary the engine DELIVERED. The grader certifies the verdict direction deterministically via readiness_consistent (deep-negative form is never a hard 'go'; the code decides, not the LLM — doc 50 EVAL-R5) and asserts voice-liveness on the summary (COACH-R7 / QA-EVAL-R11/R2.12): a number-light STATE sentence leads, the bounded form number is never the headline, and no numeric 'readiness score' appears. HRV-unavailable cases STATE that HRV was unknown rather than guess (GROUND-R7); the form-unavailable case abstains truthfully with no verdict.

cases.summary_text: You're fresh and primed to push hard today. Your form is well into the positive, so go after the big session you had planned. Heart-rate variability wasn't available this morning, so this read leans on form alone.
You're in a balanced, steady place today. Keep the rhythm you've been holding and train as planned without forcing anything. HRV wasn't recorded, so this is based on form only.

You're carrying productive fatigue, so ease back a little today. Dial the intensity down and let the recent work settle rather than digging a deeper hole. No HRV reading was available, so this leans on form alone.
You're deep in the red and need real recovery today. Take a genuine rest day; pushing now would only set you back. Heart-rate variability was unavailable, so this read is from form alone.
Your body is asking for a lighter touch today. Form sits in a neutral zone, but your recovery signal is suppressed below your baseline, so ease back rather than holding the planned load.
You're fresh and your recovery signal looks healthy, so go for it today. Form is positive and your variability is right around its normal range, with nothing holding you back.

Take it a touch easier today and let things settle. Your form points to lingering fatigue, so trim the intensity. Heart-rate variability wasn't available this morning, so I'm not guessing at recovery and this read leans on form alone.

I don't have enough data to call your readiness today. Your form hasn't been computed yet, so I can't give you a confident read. Once recent training has synced I'll be able to tell you where you stand.
